data.content: Planning handoff: use worktree `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/foolery-c4db-worker-a` on branch `codex/foolery-c4db-worker-a`; dependencies are installed. Implement optional OpenCode fields in `ApprovalRequest`, add a `permission.asked` extractor and banner lines, forward unknown OpenCode HTTP permission parts/events instead of dropping them, and verify with approval visibility + OpenCode interactive tests, lint, and typecheck. No child knots were created to avoid parallel write contention in Worker A's narrow source scope.
